title: Sanaghagara Waterfall
tagline: Sanaghagara Waterfall — heritage city of Odisha

overview.short: The Sanaghagara Waterfall is a waterfall located in the Kendujhar district in the Indian state of Odisha.
overview.description: The Sanaghagara Waterfall is a waterfall located in the Kendujhar district in the Indian state of Odisha. It is located 3 kilometers upstream of Badaghagara Waterfall, also in Kendujhar.

topPlaces.name: Kendujhar
topPlaces.description: Kendujhar, also known as Keonjhar, is a town with municipality in Kendujhar District in the Indian state of Odisha. It is the administrative headquarters of the district of Kendujhar, and it is one of the fifth scheduled areas of Odisha.

topPlaces.name: Badaghagara Waterfall
topPlaces.description: The Badaghagara Waterfall is a waterfall of the Kendujhar district in the Indian state of Odisha.

topPlaces.name: Khuntapada
topPlaces.description: Khuntapada is a village located in Jhumpura Block of Kendujhar district in Odisha, India. The village has a population of 1293 of which 650 are males while 643 are females as per the Population Census 2011.

topPlaces.name: Kendujhar (sadar)
topPlaces.description: Kendujhar Sadar is an administrative unit in the Kendujhar district in the state of Odisha, India. This subdivision consists of the town Keundujhar, the administrative headquarters of the eponymous district.

topPlaces.name: Raisuan Airstrip
topPlaces.description: Raisuan Airstrip, also known as Kendujhar Airstrip (ICAO: VEKJ) is a public airstrip located at Gopinathpur in the Kendujhar district of Odisha. Nearest airport to this airstrip is Barbil Tonto Aerodrome in Barbil, Odisha.

items.note: Kendujhar, also known as Keonjhar, is a town with municipality in Kendujhar District in the Indian state of Odisha. It is the administrative headquarters of the district of Kendujhar, and it is one of the fifth scheduled areas of Odisha.
The Badaghagara Waterfall is a waterfall of the Kendujhar district in the Indian state of Odisha.

Khuntapada is a village located in Jhumpura Block of Kendujhar district in Odisha, India. The village has a population of 1293 of which 650 are males while 643 are females as per the Population Census 2011.

Kendujhar Sadar is an administrative unit in the Kendujhar district in the state of Odisha, India. This subdivision consists of the town Keundujhar, the administrative headquarters of the eponymous district.

Raisuan Airstrip, also known as Kendujhar Airstrip (ICAO: VEKJ) is a public airstrip located at Gopinathpur in the Kendujhar district of Odisha. Nearest airport to this airstrip is Barbil Tonto Aerodrome in Barbil, Odisha.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sanaghagara Waterfall?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sanaghagara Waterfall is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sanaghagara Waterfall?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (157 km) and the nearest railway station is Jamshedpur (Tatanagar) (144 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sanaghagara Waterfall?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sanaghagara Waterfall at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sanaghagara Waterfall?
faq.a: Stays in Sanaghagara Waterfall start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sanaghagara Waterfall?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kendujhar, Badaghagara Waterfall, Khuntapada, Kendujhar (sadar), Raisuan Airstrip.
